task:
Configure Thunderbird's message-list view defaults so that:
- `mail.quickFilter.showToolbar` = `true` (Quick Filter bar shown).
- `mail.quickFilter.sticky` = `true` (Unread/Starred quick filter buttons sticky across folder changes).
- `mailnews.default_sort_type` = `18` (sort by Date) and `mailnews.default_sort_order` = `2` (descending).
- `mailnews.default_view_flags` = `1` (Grouped By Sort).

verification.description: Quick Filter bar is shown by default
Quick Filter sticky mode is enabled
Default view is Grouped By Sort (1)
